psalm-116-1.verse:
I love the Lord, because He hears
  My voice and my supplications.
psalm-116-1.prayer: Lord, I love You because You hear my voice and my prayers. Thank You for listening with mercy and care.

psalm-116-2.verse:
Because He has inclined His ear to me,
  Therefore I shall call upon Him as long as I live.
psalm-116-2.prayer: Father, because You incline Your ear to me, help me call upon You throughout my life with trust and gratitude.

psalm-116-3.prayer: Lord, when trouble, sorrow, or fear surrounds me, remind me that You are near and able to deliver.

psalm-116-4.verse:
Then I called upon the name of the Lord:
  “O Lord, I beseech You, save my life!”
psalm-116-4.prayer: Father, I call upon Your name. Save me, restore me, and lead me back into peace.

psalm-116-5.verse:
Gracious is the Lord, and righteous;
  Yes, our God is compassionate.
psalm-116-5.prayer: Lord, thank You for being gracious, righteous, and compassionate. Help me rest in Your mercy.

psalm-116-6.verse:
The Lord preserves the simple;
  I was brought low, and He saved me.
psalm-116-6.prayer: Father, thank You for preserving the simple and helping me when I am brought low.

psalm-116-7.verse:
Return to your rest, O my soul,
  For the Lord has dealt bountifully with you.
psalm-116-7.prayer: Lord, bring my soul back to rest, because You have dealt generously with me.

psalm-116-8.verse:
For You have rescued my soul from death,
  My eyes from tears,
  My feet from stumbling.
psalm-116-8.prayer: Father, thank You for rescuing my soul, drying my tears, and keeping my feet from stumbling.

psalm-116-9.verse:
I shall walk before the Lord
  In the land of the living.
psalm-116-9.prayer: Lord, help me walk before You in the land of the living with faithfulness, gratitude, and obedience.

psalm-116-10.verse:
I believed when I said,
  “I am greatly afflicted.”
psalm-116-10.prayer: Father, strengthen my faith even when I speak from affliction or pain.

psalm-116-11.verse:
I said in my alarm,
  “All men are liars.”
psalm-116-11.prayer: Lord, when disappointment makes me distrustful, keep my heart anchored in Your truth.

psalm-116-12.verse:
What shall I render to the Lord
  For all His benefits toward me?
psalm-116-12.prayer: Father, how can I repay You for all Your benefits to me? Help me respond with worship, obedience, and gratitude.

psalm-116-13.verse:
I shall lift up the cup of salvation
  And call upon the name of the Lord.
psalm-116-13.prayer: Lord, help me lift the cup of salvation and call upon Your name with thanksgiving.

psalm-116-14.verse:
I shall pay my vows to the Lord,
  Oh may it be in the presence of all His people.
psalm-116-14.prayer: Father, help me fulfill my vows to You faithfully and honor You among Your people.

psalm-116-15.verse:
Precious in the sight of the Lord
  Is the death of His godly ones.
psalm-116-15.prayer: Lord, thank You that the lives of Your faithful ones are precious in Your sight.

psalm-116-16.verse:
O Lord, surely I am Your servant,
  I am Your servant, the son of Your handmaid,
  You have loosed my bonds.
psalm-116-16.prayer: Father, I am Your servant. Thank You for loosening my bonds and setting me free.

psalm-116-17.verse:
To You I shall offer a sacrifice of thanksgiving,
  And call upon the name of the Lord.
psalm-116-17.prayer: Lord, help me offer thanksgiving from a sincere heart and continually call upon Your name.

psalm-116-18.verse:
I shall pay my vows to the Lord,
  Oh may it be in the presence of all His people,
psalm-116-18.prayer: Father, help me keep my commitments to You openly, faithfully, and with reverence.

psalm-116-19.verse:
In the courts of the Lord’s house,
  In the midst of you, O Jerusalem.
  Praise the Lord!
psalm-116-19.prayer: Lord, let my life praise You in the midst of Your people and bless Your holy name.

psalm-116-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for hearing my prayers, rescuing my soul, drying my tears, and keeping my feet from stumbling. Teach me to rest in Your goodness, walk before You with gratitude, and call upon Your name all my life. Help me live as Your faithful servant, honor my commitments to You, and offer thanksgiving from a sincere heart. May my life continually praise You for Your mercy, salvation, and love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
